---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: styles/hero.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-wrapper">
  <img src="water.JPG" alt="Water hero image" class="hero-image" />
  <div class="hero-overlay">
    <div class="hero-title">Your Headline Here</div>
    <div class="hero-subtitle">Your subheading goes here</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Let's Connect

You can [email me](mailto:you@example.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-profile).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
